name: a2api
description: A2API: agent-generated controlled APIJSON CRUD with A2UI-style bindings

scripts.build: npm run build -w @a2api/protocol && npm run build -w @a2api/runtime && npm run build -w @a2api/chat-demo
scripts.test: npm run build -w @a2api/protocol && npm run test -w @a2api/protocol && npm run test -w @a2api/runtime
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @a2api/protocol && npm run typecheck -w @a2api/runtime && npm run typecheck -w @a2api/chat-demo
